series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, applications, Division memorandum or correspondence associated with an Ohio land professional application.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records are imaged and indexed upon Division receipt. Upon confirmation that imaging and indexing were properly completed ; Electronic: Any records maintained in machine readable format are be retained from date of receipt by Division and ; Microform: Any microfiche records are be retained from date of receipt by Division and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Recycle
